definition:
1. to oversee, observe, survey , of the sun, (Homer):—;then of the gods, to watch over, observe, take notice of , (Odyssey by Homer), etc.; of a general going his rounds, (Thucydides); to visit  the sick, (Xenophon Historicus) 
2. simply, to look upon, view, behold , (Odyssey by Homer), etc.:—;Pass., ὅσον ἐφεωρᾶτο τῆς νήσου as much of it as was in view , (Thucydides) 
3. to look out, choose , ἐπιόψομαι ἥτις ἀρίστη (Odyssey by Homer), etc. (ML)
